fiscalPeriods.reopenReasonPlaceholder: Enter reason for reopening this period...
fiscalPeriods.lockWarning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone!
fiscalPeriods.lockDescription: Locking a period is typically done after an audit. A locked period cannot be reopened.
